description_long: This bookcase features a minimalist, geometric design with a rectangular wooden base and shelf, supported by four slender black metal rods. The shelf is positioned above the base, creating a single open storage area for books or other items. The top of the bookcase is capped with a matching wooden bar, visually echoing the base and shelf. The rods are evenly spaced, providing both structural support and a modern aesthetic. The wood has a light, natural finish, while the metal rods offer a stark, industrial contrast. The overall construction appears sturdy yet lightweight, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A minimalist bookcase with a light wood base, shelf, and top bar, supported by four black metal rods in a modern, open-frame design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the wooden base, shelf, and top bar, with four vertical black rods evenly spaced.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelf and base, and the angled alignment of the rods connecting all three wooden elements.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the rectangular shape of the shelf and base, and the parallel arrangement of the rods.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the bookcase and the alignment of the rods.
